title: More Brewable Potions
description: Adds potions (and tipped arrow) items for the potion effects.
body:
Unofficial Mod port of [More Vanilla Potions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-potions "More Vanilla Potions") to 1.18.2 for fabric. Every issue related to this mod has to be posted in the comments or on my GitHub, not to the origin mod.

Adds potions (and tipped arrow) items for the potion effects that Mojang hasn't made brewable for whatever reason.
## Brewing Recipes:
-   **Haste:** Swiftness + Gold Nugget
-   **Mining** Fatigue: Haste + Fermented Spider Eye
-   **Luck:** Awkward + Emerald
-   **Unluck:** Luck + Fermented Spider Eye
-   **Nausea:** Awkward + Poisonous Potato
-   **Blindness:** Awkward + Ink Sac
-   **Levitation:** Slow Falling + Fermented Spider Eye
-   **Resistance:** Awkward + Nautilus Shell
-   **Saturation:** Awkward + Beetroot
-   **Hunger:** Saturation + Fermented Spider Eye
-   **Withering:** Awkward + Wither Rose
-   **Absorption:** Awkward + Golden Apple
-   **Health Boost:** Absorption + Glistering Melon

Conduit Power, Bad Omen, and Hero of the Village have been left unbrewable, as they are used as flags or area effects by the game.
